mapper.sql: attr_id, attr_type, attr_name, attr_code, sort_order, is_deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
select
from tb_turquoise_attr_dict where is_deleted = 0 and attr_type = #{attrType,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into tb_turquoise_attr_dict (attr_type, attr_name, attr_code, sort_order, is_deleted, create_time, update_time) values (#{attrType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attrName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attrCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sortOrder,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{isDeleted,jdbcType=INTEGER}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update tb_turquoise_attr_dict set is_deleted = 1, update_time = now() where attr_id = #{attrId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
update tb_turquoise_attr_dict set attr_name = #{attrName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = now() where attr_id = #{attrId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
